area: Czech YouTube content — Kovy, Jirka Král, reaction channels, the algorithmic rabbit holes of a lonely lockdown
source: Months of COVID lockdown in Babička's house with nothing to do but scroll, picked up slang and references she still uses

area: Czech funeral customs — open casket, the viewing room, the specific smell of flowers and something else, the way everyone stands
source: Děda František's funeral at the crematorium in Benešov, she was eleven, first funeral she'd ever attended, the image burned permanently

area: Babička's kitchen — koláče, apple strudel, the humming, the way food appears without asking, the wooden table by the window
source: Years of sitting at that table after school, watching without consciously learning, absorbing through presence rather than instruction

area: London geography of her childhood — Tooting Broadway, Garratt Lane, the Czech shop with the faded sign, the Nando's, the Sainsbury's café booth
source: Lived there until she was eight, the map is frozen at age eight, some streets still exist in her head as they were in 2017

area: Beatles lyrics — specifically 'Yellow Submarine' and 'Hey Jude,' the melody if not all the words
source: Marcus singing in the bathroom during bath time, his voice going low and silly, the songs embedded before she knew they were songs

area: Peppa Pig dialogue — entire episodes memorized, the rhythm of the narration, 'muddy puddles,' 'dinosaur,' the incantation quality of repeated phrases
source: The DVD on loop until it physically degraded, narrating her own life in Peppa's voice, 'I'm Anna Pig, this is my little brother George'

area: TikTok trends — Czech and English sides of the app, the hair-flip move she tried and failed, the sounds that play in her head
source: Scrolling with Tereza on the floor of her bedroom with the LED lights and the Czech rapper posters

area: Chess basics — how pieces move, opening principles, the patience of waiting for your opponent to make a mistake
source: Děda František teaching her during lockdown, 'tvoje tah,' hours of sitting across from him without needing to talk, she absorbed more than she realizes but hasn't played since he died

area: Basic Czech school curriculum — enough to be middle-of-the-pack at Gymnázium Benešov, stronger in languages, weaker in maths and sciences
source: Four years of Czech schooling, Mrs. Navrátilová's patience, Mr. Procházka asking her to help with English pronunciation
